title: Key Evidence Gina Gazvoda Packet Inventory
summary: Structured inventory and provenance map for a 24-page family-assembled packet containing mixed probate, police, EMS, funeral, death-related, and medical-office records.

identified_source_groups.description: Waterbury Probate Court case-index material and petition-related forms concerning Estate case 21-01204, including material related to admission of a July 28, 2019 will.
identified_source_groups.source_rule: Separate signed court decrees from party-filed petitions, notices, confidential docket entries, and administrative forms.

identified_source_groups.description: Waterbury Police records concerning the emergency call, dispatch, response, and incident narrative.
identified_source_groups.source_rule: Publish only privacy-protected summaries that omit exact address, phone information, responder identifiers, and unrelated administrative fields.

identified_source_groups.description: Trinity Health of New England EMS patient-care records containing response details and medical information.
identified_source_groups.source_rule: Restrict the full record and publish only narrowly necessary, source-attributed facts.

identified_source_groups.description: Funeral-home, death-related, and medical-office paperwork containing procedural information, private identifiers, signatures, and medical detail.
identified_source_groups.source_rule: Require record-specific authentication, relevance review, and redaction before any public derivative.

privacy_risks: Private-party names and administrative details not necessary for public understanding
provenance_workflow: Identify the generating organization or person for each page.
Separate the source record from family interpretation, expert opinion, legal argument, and unresolved inference.
Verify dates, case numbers, page sequence, authorship, and context.
Redact unnecessary identifiers and sensitive information.
Publish a local derivative that states what the source establishes and what remains unknown.
scope_limitations: The packet is a compilation and is not itself one official record.
Inclusion of a page in the packet does not establish authenticity, accuracy, completeness, or legal significance.
The packet does not independently prove homicide, criminal guilt, motive, negligence, or civil liability.
The full packet is not suitable for unrestricted public hosting because it contains personal identifiers and medical information.
Each page must be evaluated according to its own source, purpose, context, and verification status.

provenance.review_method: Direct text and document-structure review of the 24-page PDF packet
provenance.notes: The public page inventories source groups and links to privacy-protected local derivatives without hosting the private source packet.

page_citations: Key Evidence Gina Gazvoda packet, pages 1-24 reviewed
Probate material begins in the opening packet pages
Waterbury Police material appears in the middle packet section
Trinity Health of New England EMS material appears in the later packet section
redaction_notes: The public inventory omits addresses, contact information, signatures, patient-care details, private-party identifiers, and other data not necessary to describe the packet's structure.
publication_authority: Family-authorized packet inventory and provenance map; the original packet remains restricted.

revision_history.change_summary: Replaced the generic key-evidence route with a source-reviewed packet inventory and provenance map.
